# Stock Information - Project Setup Guide

## Project Overview
A Vite + TypeScript web application for systematic US stock market analysis with:
- **Macro Dashboard**: Macroeconomic indicators and market trends
- **Personalized Watchlist**: Stock search, favorites, and fundamental/technical analysis

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Create .github/copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Get project setup info for Vite
- [x] Scaffold Vite project structure
- [x] Install dependencies
- [ ] Install recommended extensions
- [x] Verify build compiles
- [x] Create dev server task
- [x] Create README with project info

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Component-based architecture with React
- Responsive UI design
- Integration with financial data APIs
- Focus on performance and user experience

## Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run lint` - Run linter
